name: Alex Gaudon
description: Developer & outdoor enthusiast. Builds tools, hikes trails, and runs community stuff.

name: Amara Okafor
description: Frontend dev and accessibility advocate. Audits sites for a11y. Writes angry but useful blog posts.

name: Chloe Moreau
description: Security researcher who breaks things for a living. Discloses responsibly, lectures passionately.

name: Dmitry Volkov
description: Crypto skeptic turned blockchain dev. Building stuff that doesn't require a whitepaper to explain.

name: Hana Kim
description: ML engineer at a robotics company. Spends more time cleaning data than training models.

name: Isabella Rossi
description: Data engineer knee-deep in dbt and Airflow. Makes dashboards that executives actually look at.

name: James Okonkwo
description: Mobile dev building fintech for the unbanked. Flutter by day, dad by night.

name: Lucas Muller
description: Open source maintainer. Rust enthusiast. Has strong opinions about error messages.

name: Maya Chen
description: Staff engineer at a fintech startup. Ships fast, breaks less often than she used to.

name: Noah Williams
description: Full-stack dev running a two-person consultancy. Ships mostly Next.js and burns out occasionally.

name: Omar Hassan
description: DevOps engineer turned cloud architect. Automates everything. Yes, even that.

name: Priya Sharma
description: Product manager who can actually code. Bridges the gap between 'user need' and 'just build it.'

name: Ravi Patel
description: Backend engineer who accidentally became an SRE. Writes postmortems people actually read.

name: Sofia Bergstrom
description: Designer turned frontend dev. Obsessed with typography and CSS grids.

name: Takeshi Yamamoto
description: Game developer who shipped 3 titles on Steam. Currently learning Godot and enjoying it.

name: Yuki Tanaka
description: Platform engineer at a scale-up. Migrated 200 services to Kubernetes without waking anyone up.
